text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper exists and is published in Nature Computational Science (2024), but the cited authors ("Chia-Yu et al. Chang") are completely fabricated — none of them appear among the real authors. The actual authors are Raphael Schäfer, Till Nicke, Henning Höfener, Annkristin Lange, Dorit Merhof, Friedrich Feuerhake, Volkmar Schulz, Johannes Lotz, and Fabian Kiessling. This is a classic hallucination pattern where a real title is grafted onto entirely wrong author names.
LINK: https://www.nature.com/articles/s43588-024-00662-z
